name: Beefy Calzones
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup finely chopped green bell pepper
1/2 cup A-1 Thick and Hearty Steak Sauce
2 packages (11 oz.) refrigerated pizza crust dough
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet over medium-high heat, cook the beef, onion, pepper, and garlic until the beef is no longer pink. Stir to break up the meat and drain excess fat. Keep warm.
2. In a small skillet over medium heat, heat the tomato sauce, steak sauce, and Italian seasoning until it comes to a boil. Reduce the heat to low and simmer for 5 minutes or until slightly thickened. Stir in 1 cup of the tomato sauce mixture into the beef mixture; set aside. Keep the remaining tomato sauce mixture warm.
3. Unroll one package of pizza dough and divide it into 4 equal pieces. Roll each piece into a 6-inch square. Spoon 1/3 cup of the reserved beef mixture onto the center of each square. Top with 1/4 cup of shredded mozzarella cheese. Fold the dough over to form a triangle.
4. Press edges together firmly with the tines of a fork to seal well. Place on lightly greased baking sheets. Repeat with the remaining dough, filling, and cheese to make a total of 8 calzones.
5. Bake at 400°F for 20 minutes or until golden brown. Serve with warm sauce. Garnish as desired. Makes 8 servings.
